review: Used to be a good app. Was by far the best of any major chain restaurant. I liked the ease of use, the simplicity of pickup options, and the auto-charging to my credit card. But for god's sake, stop telling me not to text and drive every time I log into the app. When this is removed, I'll restore the 5 stars. Allow functionality to remove the McDelivery. I don't want to see it. I'll never use it. Stop pushing it. Remove the 'Exclusive Add-on'. This dirties an otherwise clean app.
